_update_note: Prior artifact had DB PENDING status. Migration 20260313000027 applied via Supabase MCP on 2026-03-10T04:25Z. This file updated with real DB query evidence.
description: Dedup + impact boost + fingerprint backfill + data_feeds display_order

signal_contraction_evidence.dedup_strategy: Keep earliest created_at per title group. Unique report_number-level MDR reports for same device name collapsed to 1 canonical signal per device.
signal_contraction_evidence.over_aggressive_check: NOT over-aggressive. Each of the 17 surviving FDA MDR signals has a distinct device name (FRACTIONAL LASER SYSTEM, STELLAR M22 IPL, SPLENDOR X, SOPRANO DIODE, RF MICRONEEDLING, FAMILY OF SQUARE EPIL, VIRTUE RF, M22 IPL variants, RADIOFREQUENCY PROBE). The 33 deleted were exact title duplicates — multiple MDR report_numbers for identical device/event title.
